TestCase z35Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n2 > 0) {
        double* follow_case_b = (double*)malloc(t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
        memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
        follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    }
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n2 < 1
    if (follow_case.n2 < 1) {
        // No elements to modify, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    // Add 5.0 to a random element in follow_case.b
    int rand_index = 0; // default to zero
    // Use simple random index selection if possible
    // Since standard rand() is not guaranteed here, pick element 0 for safety
    // If environment allows, could use rand() % follow_case.n2
    // But for safety and reproducibility, choose first element
    rand_index = 0;
    follow_case.b[rand_index] += 5.0;

    return follow_case;
}
